description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a “line of dots followed by a trailing dot.”
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D3, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a "line of dots followed by a trailing dot." Four UAP were observed flying in the field of view (FOV) at approximately 1736Z. Cloud coverage obstructed a clear visual. One UAP was observed at 17:36:22, two UAP side by side at 17:36:30, and one UAP at 17:36:49.
reported_object_description: A line of dots followed by a trailing dot; 4 UAP
reported_behavior: Flying in FOV; observed beneath aircraft; observed side by side
bust_reasoning: The document explicitly states 'UAP Advanced Capabilities And/Or Materials (yes/no; if yes, describe): NO', which is a strong indicator against an anomalous object. The visual description of '4X UAP OBSERVED FLYING IN FOV' as 'dots' and 'side by side' over a short timeframe is consistent with a satellite train or multiple conventional aircraft, especially given that cloud cover obstructed a clear visual. There is no unredacted information suggesting anomalous kinematics or multi-sensor confirmation that would resist a prosaic explanation.

[redacted]
cover_up_reasoning: The report is classified SECRET and contains substantial redactions that go beyond routine operational security. The entire narrative section describing the UAP event is almost completely redacted, along with critical UAP characteristics such as maneuverability, response to observer actions, propulsion, payload, and whether it was under intelligent control. The redaction of 'Observation Interrogation of UAP' is particularly notable given radar was a listed sensor modality.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称观察到“一串点状物，后随一个拖尾点状物”。大约在1736Z时，在视场（FOV）内观察到四个UAP飞行。云层遮挡了清晰的视线。在17:36:22观察到一个UAP，在17:36:30观察到两个UAP并排飞行，在17:36:49观察到一个UAP。
reported_object_description_zh: 一串点状物，后随一个拖尾点状物；4个UAP
reported_behavior_zh: 在FOV内飞行；在飞机下方观察到；并排观察到
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确指出“UAP先进能力和/或材料（是/否；如是，请描述）：否”，这强烈表明其并非异常物体。对“在FOV内观察到4个UAP飞行”的视觉描述为“点状物”和“并排”，在短时间内出现，这与卫星列队或多架常规飞机的情况相符，特别是考虑到云层遮挡了清晰的视线。没有未经删节的信息表明存在异常运动学特征或多传感器确认，足以排除普通解释。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该报告被列为“绝密”，并包含大量超出常规行动安全范围的删节内容。描述UAP事件的整个叙述部分几乎被完全删节，以及UAP的关键特征，例如机动性、对观察者行动的反应、推进方式、有效载荷以及是否受智能控制。鉴于雷达被列为一种传感器模式，对“UAP观察审讯”的删节尤其值得注意。
claims: U.S. military operator observed a "line of dots followed by a trailing dot"
claims_zh: 美国军事操作员观察到“一串点状物，后随一个拖尾点状物”
云层遮挡了清晰的视线
bust_explanations: Starlink satellite train or similar satellite constellation, appearing as a line of dots or multiple objects in formation.
Multiple conventional aircraft or drones flying in close proximity or formation.
Atmospheric phenomena or optical illusion, potentially exacerbated by cloud cover and limited visual clarity.
bust_explanations_zh: 星链卫星列队或类似的卫星星座，表现为一串点状物或多个编队物体。
多架常规飞机或无人机近距离或编队飞行。
大气现象或光学错觉，可能因云层遮挡和有限的视觉清晰度而加剧。
cover_up_indicators: Redaction of 'UAP Response to Observer Actions'
Redaction of 'Observation Interrogation of UAP (yes/no; if yes list sensor(s) and returns)::'
Redaction of 'UAP Propulsion Means', 'UAP Payload', 'UAP Under Intelligent Control', and 'UAP Signatures'
cover_up_indicators_zh: 整个“叙述”部分几乎被完全删节
“UAP对观察者行动的反应”被删节
“UAP观察审讯（是/否；如是，请列出传感器及回波）：”被删节
“UAP推进方式”、“UAP有效载荷”、“UAP是否受智能控制”和“UAP特征”被删节
